steps.title: Locate the lowest weight in the table
steps.content: The statement asks for the bear with the lowest approximate weight. Scanning the rightmost column (Approximate weight), the values are 400, 800, 375, and 200 pounds. The minimum value is 200 pounds.

steps.title: Identify the bear's sex and age
steps.content: The bear weighing 200 pounds (bear 122) is listed as male and 3 years old. The other three choices describe bears with higher weights—either 400, 800, or 375 pounds—making them incorrect. This matches choice D — D is correct.
